2605.06546.title: Efficient Pre-Training with Token Superposition
2605.06546.paper_summary: Pre-training of Large Language Models is often prohibitively expensive and inefficient at scale, requiring complex and invasive modifications in order to achieve high data throughput. In this work, we present Token-Superposition Training (TST), a simple drop-in method that significantly improves the data throughput per FLOPs during pre-training without modifying the parallelism, optimizer, tokenizer, data, or model architecture. TST is done in two phases: (i) A highly efficient superposition phase where we combine many contiguous tokens into one bag and train using a multi-hot cross-entropy (MCE) objective, and (ii) a recovery phase where we revert back to standard training. We extensively evaluate TST on the scale of 270M and 600M parameters and validate on 3B and a 10B A1B mixture of experts model, demonstrating that it is highly robust in different settings. Ultimately, TST consistently outperforms baseline loss and downstream evaluations, and under equal-loss settings, TST yields up to a 2.5x reduction in total pre-training time at the 10B A1B scale.
2605.06546.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型的預訓練通常在規模上是昂貴且低效的，這需要複雜且侵入性的修改以實現高數據吞吐量。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了令牌超疊訓練（Token-Superposition Training, TST），這是一種簡單的即插即用方法，能顯著提高預訓練期間每 FLOPs 的數據吞吐量，而無需修改並行性、優化器、分詞器、數據或模型架構。<lb/>TST 分為兩個階段進行： (i) 一個高效的超疊階段，我們將許多連續的令牌合併為一個袋子，並使用多熱交叉熵（multi-hot cross-entropy, MCE）目標進行訓練； (ii) 一個恢復階段，我們恢復到標準訓練。<lb/>我們在 270M 和 600M 參數的規模上廣泛評估了 TST，並在 3B 和 10B A1B 專家模型的混合上進行驗證，證明其在不同設置下具有高度的穩健性。<lb/>最終，TST 始終超越基準損失和下游評估，在相同損失設置下，TST 在 10B A1B 規模下能將總預訓練時間減少多達 2.5 倍。
2605.06546.author: Bowen Peng et.al.
2605.06546.authors: Bowen Peng, Théo Gigant, Jeffrey Quesnelle
